description: Event publication broadcast — 3 of these 4 fixtures are NOT created by uat-seed.sh's unconditional flow today (only uat-operator is, via STEP 3's ensure_test_user). Payloads for uat-member-consented, uat-member-no-consent, and uat-event-draft-uz are authored from docs/02-business-processes/uat/BP-UAT-001.md's Seed Fixtures Required table and step text (Step 002: DRAFT status badge; Step 006: uat-member-no-consent excluded from recipient count), not lifted from existing script code.

fixtures.note: Already seeded unconditionally by STEP 3 (ensure_test_user). Reset semantics: restore group membership (aiqadam-super-admin) via the existing FORCE_REGEN path — never delete/recreate (would invalidate Authentik sessions/PKs per FR-WORKFLOW-003 functional-scope item 3).

Not created by uat-seed.sh's unconditional flow today (only uat-member/uat-operator are). Reset creates-if-missing then restores group membership, same idiom as ensure_test_user's existing FORCE_REGEN branch. The events-purpose consent row (member_consents) is the domain half of this fixture — see the paired 'uat-member-consented-consent' domain entry below.

member_consents.member is an FK to directus_users.id — resolved at recreate time by looking up the uat-member-consented identity's Authentik/Directus user id, same pattern ensure_operator_invite() already uses for authentik_user_id.

Not created by uat-seed.sh's unconditional flow today. No member_consents row for purpose='events' is created for this identity — that absence IS the fixture's declared initial state (BP-UAT-001.md: 'no member_consents row for events'). Reset must NOT create a consent row for this member.

Not created by uat-seed.sh's unconditional flow today (STEP 4 today only inserts operator_invites rows). Authored from BP-UAT-001.md Step 002 ('Status badge shows DRAFT') and the Seed Fixtures Required table ('status=draft, capacity=20, 0 registrations'). country='uz' must match the operator's country scope per the doc's Notes section.

payload.title: UAT Event UZ
payload.description: UAT fixture event for BP-UAT-001 (event publication broadcast).
